headline: Boot Room Bulletin
text: Colombia (Nina) beat Uzbekistan (Zoe) 3-1; points were acquired, dignity was redistributed. Ghana (Tom) slapped a 1-0 receipt on Panama (Ravi), very arcade cabinet final-boss behaviour. England (Chris) got the glow-up with a 4-2 win over Croatia (Owen); the loser is now staring meaningfully at the fixtures. Overall, Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya are sharing top spot by tie-break wizardry on 7 points, while Zoe, Ben, Ella are propping up the bracket on 1 point like unpaid stagehands. The table snapshot: 7 points: Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya; 6 points: Owen; 5 points: Sam, Chris; 4 points: Priya, Grace, Ravi; 2 points: Leo; 1 point: Zoe, Ben, Ella.
